metadata.description: Shared AI Skills by Development Seed

plugins.name: github-issue-to-markdown
plugins.description: Exports GitHub Issues to structured Markdown using the gh CLI

plugins.name: veda-story-creator
plugins.description: Generates VEDA scrollytelling story MDX files with satellite data visualizations

plugins.name: geotiff-to-cog
plugins.description: Convert GeoTIFF files to Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFFs (COG) with automatic CRS reprojection and validation

plugins.name: netcdf-to-cog
plugins.description: Convert NetCDF files to Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFFs (COG) with support for geostationary satellites and CF conventions

plugins.name: geojson-to-geoparquet
plugins.description: Convert GeoJSON files to GeoParquet with column lowercasing and validation

plugins.name: shapefile-to-geoparquet
plugins.description: Convert Shapefiles (including zipped) to GeoParquet with column lowercasing and validation
